title: SseFrame is pub struct without #[non_exhaustive]
description: SseFrame { pub event, pub id } is a public struct with no #[non_exhaustive]. RFC 8895 §9.2 mandates clients honour the 'retry:' SSE field; adding it to SseFrame later is a breaking change for any caller that constructs SseFrame by name (e.g. in their own tests or mocks). SseEvent correctly carries #[non_exhaustive] but SseFrame does not. Maintenance consequence: the next spec-driven field addition forces a semver bump or leaves the retry field unparsed forever.
